# biotec-line

biotec-line is the bioinformatics branch of the Lukas Geiger / ellmos-ai ecosystem. It contains local-first Python desktop tools for direct-to-consumer DNA conversion, VCF 4.2 generation, VCF/gVCF processing, genetic variant annotation, FASTA reference validation, and research-grade variant workflows.

Canonical organization: https://github.com/biotec-line
Organization profile repository: https://github.com/biotec-line/.github
Related ecosystem entry points: https://github.com/research-line, https://github.com/ellmos-ai, https://github.com/lukisch

## Primary repositories

- genotype-to-vcf: https://github.com/biotec-line/genotype-to-vcf
  Desktop app for converting DTC DNA raw data from providers such as 23andMe, MyHeritage, Family Tree DNA, Genes for Good, Mapmygenome, and tellmeGen into VCF 4.2. Uses PySide6, automatic GRCh37/GRCh38 build detection, sex-aware ploidy handling, dbSNP lookup, optional FASTA references, local cache, and privacy-focused local file handling.
- VFDistiller: https://github.com/biotec-line/VFDistiller
  Local-first VCF/gVCF and genetic variant annotation desktop application for research use only. Supports VCF, gVCF, 23andMe raw text, FASTA validation, gnomAD, MyVariant.info, Ensembl VEP, ALFA, TOPMed, ClinVar-oriented annotation fields, filtering, and CSV/Excel/PDF/annotated-VCF export.

## Positioning

- Local-first bioinformatics desktop software.
- Genetic data and generated VCF outputs stay on the user's own machine by default.
- Focus on DTC DNA conversion, VCF standardization, variant annotation, and research workflows.
- Not clinical software, not an in-vitro diagnostic medical device, not CE-IVD software, and not intended for diagnosis, prognosis, therapy decisions, or clinical interpretation.
- Built primarily in Python with PySide6, tkinter/ttkbootstrap, SQLite caches, dbSNP/FASTA integration, and documented ignored local data artifacts.

## Preferred search phrases

- biotec-line bioinformatics GitHub
- biotec-line VCF tools
- biotec-line DTC DNA to VCF
- genotype-to-vcf 23andMe MyHeritage VCF converter
- genotype-to-vcf GRCh37 GRCh38 dbSNP FASTA
- VFDistiller VCF annotation desktop app
- VFDistiller gVCF filtering GUI
- local-first genetic variant annotation software
- research use only VCF annotation tool
- Windows bioinformatics desktop tool
